overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character traversing a futuristic urban environment. The character moves from a covered plaza beneath an overpass, through a graffiti-lined tunnel, and emerges into a sunlit street alongside the Arasaka Waterfront corporate complex with elevated highways overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered plaza beneath overpass with large advertisements

events.description: character steps onto yellow striped crosswalk and begins crossing toward tunnel entrance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the yellow crosswalk toward the dark tunnel entrance

entered.detail: massive illuminated billboard with red background displaying 'DO YOU FEEL THE ITCH?' advertisement
several vehicles parked along the right side of the covered area
broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing lines on asphalt
massive concrete pillars and ceiling of the overhead highway structure

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered urban plaza beneath a massive overpass. The character walks across a prominent yellow striped crosswalk toward a dark tunnel entrance, passing large red illuminated advertisements on the walls. The environment is artificially lit with mixed natural light filtering in from the sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban underpass tunnel with graffiti-covered walls

events.description: entering the dark tunnel from the covered plaza, lighting shifts to artificial overhead lights
approaching the tunnel exit, bright daylight becomes visible at the far end

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit tunnel, passing other pedestrians walking in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket and dark pants walking toward the camera
pedestrian in teal jacket and red pants walking toward the camera

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in colorful spray paint and street art
linear fluorescent light fixtures mounted on the tunnel ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow urban tunnel with graffiti-covered walls and artificial overhead lighting. Other pedestrians walk toward the camera from the opposite direction. Vehicles can be seen driving on the road to the left. The tunnel gradually brightens as the exit approaches, revealing daylight ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban intersection with corporate waterfront building

events.description: exiting the tunnel into bright morning sunlight, revealing the open street and Arasaka building
crossing the street at the intersection while vehicles pass by

agents.ego_description: exiting the tunnel and crossing the open street toward the sidewalk alongside the Arasaka building

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving along the street past the intersection

entered.detail: massive dark corporate building with illuminated Arasaka logo and red accent lighting
multi-level highway ramps and overpasses towering above the street
urban crossroads with traffic signals and pedestrian crossing markings

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the tunnel into bright morning sunlight, transitioning from the enclosed space to a wide-open urban intersection. The massive Arasaka Waterfront building dominates the right side with its corporate branding, while elevated highways loom overhead. The character crosses the street as vehicles pass by.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk alongside elevated highway and corporate complex

events.description: character transitions from walking to jogging along the sidewalk
passing traffic lights and street signs at Martin Street intersection

agents.ego_description: walking and occasionally jogging along the sidewalk next to the Arasaka building, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: adult pedestrian walking ahead on the sidewalk carrying a bag
small child in green shirt walking alongside an adult

entered.detail: street name sign indicating 'Martin' mounted on traffic light pole
regulatory sign displaying speed limit of 40
tall pole with traffic signals showing green lights

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along the sunlit sidewalk beside the Arasaka building, with massive elevated highway structures overhead casting long shadows. The character alternates between walking and jogging past street signs and traffic lights at the Martin Street intersection. Other pedestrians walk ahead on the sidewalk while traffic flows along the adjacent road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, covered urban plaza through a narrow tunnel and out into a bright, corporate city district. It begins beneath a massive overpass, where the character crosses a yellow striped crosswalk past glowing red advertisements toward a dark tunnel entrance. As the camera enters the tunnel, the environment shifts to a confined space of graffiti-covered walls and artificial lighting, with the scene gradually brightening as the exit comes into view. The camera then emerges from the enclosure into brilliant morning sunlight, opening up to a wide intersection dominated by the towering Arasaka Waterfront building and looming elevated highways. Finally, the movement continues along a sunlit sidewalk, passing through the alternating light and long shadows of the overhead structures at the Martin Street intersection.
